title: Authors and Citation
text: Coverdale C (2026). comtrade: Access Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data. R package version 0.1.1, https://github.com/charlescoverdale/comtrade.
code: @Manual{,   title = {comtrade: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data},   author = {Charles Coverdale},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.1},   url = {https://github.com/charlescoverdale/comtrade}, }

what: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data
title: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data
text: comtrade provides clean, tidy access international trade data United Nations Comtrade database directly R, plus built-trade analytics (RCA, HHI, trade balance, growth rates, concordance).

title: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data
text: United Nations Comtrade database largest repository international merchandise trade statistics world. 200 countries territories report annual monthly trade data UN Statistics Division, standardises, validates, publishes consistent format. database covers goods trade 1962 present services trade 2000, commodity detail 6-digit Harmonized System (HS) level. Comtrade standard data source bilateral trade flow analysis, gravity models, revealed comparative advantage, trade policy evaluation, supply chain research. underpins publications World Bank, WTO, UNCTAD, academic trade economics research.

what: How is this different from comtradr?
title: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data
text: existing R package called comtradr, maintained Paul Bochtler rOpenSci. wraps Comtrade Plus API. comtrade adds: Built-trade analytics: comtradr data pipe . compute RCA, HHI, trade balance, growth rates, need additional packages (economiccomplexity, concordance) manual code. comtrade includes ct_rca(), ct_hhi(), ct_balance(), ct_growth(), ct_share(), ct_compare() box. Classification concordance: ct_concordance() converts HS, SITC, BEC classifications built-lookup table. separate package needed. Works without API key: basic queries use Comtrade preview endpoint automatically. registration required simple trade lookups. Fewer dependencies: comtrade depends 3 packages (cli, httr2, tools). comtradr depends 14 (including lubridate, purrr, poorman, stringr, readr, fs, rappdirs, memoise, cachem, lifecycle, askpass). CRAN-safe caching: uses tools::R_user_dir() instead rappdirs. Returns data.frames: tibbles. Consistent base R workflows.

title: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data
code: # From CRAN install.packages("comtrade")  # Development version from GitHub # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("charlescoverdale/comtrade")

title: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data
text: Basic queries work without key. package automatically falls back Comtrade preview endpoint, returns 500 records per call without registration. full access (100,000 records per call, commodity descriptions, detailed partner breakdowns), register free key comtradedeveloper.un.org (500 calls/day, cost): make permanent don’t set every session, add .Renviron file. Run file.edit("~/.Renviron") R, add line COMTRADE_API_KEY=-key, save, restart R. package pick automatically .
code: library(comtrade) ct_set_key("your-subscription-key") #> Comtrade API key set for this session.

title: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data
code: library(comtrade)  # UK total exports to the world, 2023 uk <- ct_trade("GBR", flow = "X", year = 2023) head(uk) #>   reporter reporter_desc partner partner_desc flow flow_desc commodity_code #>        826           GBR       0        World    X   Export          TOTAL #>   commodity_desc year period trade_value_usd net_weight_kg quantity quantity_unit #>            Total 2023   2023   4.685e+11             0        0          <NA>

title: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data
code: # Australia's top 5 exports by HS chapter ct_top_products("AUS", flow = "X", year = 2023, n = 5) #>   commodity_code      commodity_desc        value share_pct rank #>               26  Ores, slag, ash    1.256e+11     33.21    1 #>               27  Mineral fuels      1.081e+11     28.60    2 #>               71  Precious stones     2.014e+10      5.33    3 #>               02  Meat             1.043e+10      2.76    4 #>               10  Cereals          5.874e+09      1.55    5

title: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data
code: # US trade balance with China, 2020-2023 ct_balance("USA", partner = "CHN", year = 2020:2023) #>   partner partner_desc year      exports      imports      balance #>       156        China 2020  1.246e+11   4.352e+11  -3.106e+11 #>       156        China 2021  1.511e+11   5.063e+11  -3.552e+11 #>       156        China 2022  1.538e+11   5.368e+11  -3.830e+11 #>       156        China 2023  1.478e+11   4.272e+11  -2.794e+11

title: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data
code: # Which products does Australia have a comparative advantage in? rca <- ct_rca("AUS", year = 2023, level = 2) head(rca[rca$has_advantage, ], 5) #>   commodity_code commodity_desc  reporter_value  world_value  rca has_advantage #>               26 Ores, slag      1.256e+11     3.95e+11   18.42          TRUE #>               02 Meat            1.043e+10     1.29e+11    4.69          TRUE #>               10 Cereals         5.874e+09     8.05e+10    4.23          TRUE #>               51 Wool            2.817e+09     1.18e+10   13.84          TRUE #>               04 Dairy, eggs     3.122e+09     4.67e+10    3.88          TRUE

title: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data
code: # How concentrated are Australia's export destinations? ct_hhi("AUS", flow = "X", year = 2023, by = "partner") #>   year  hhi concentration n_items     top_item top_share_pct #>   2023 1847      moderate     196        China         32.71

title: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data
Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data
code: # What SITC section does HS chapter 27 (mineral fuels) map to? ct_concordance("27", from = "HS", to = "SITC") #>   from_code          from_desc to_code       to_desc #>          27 Mineral fuels, oils       3 Mineral fuels

title: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data
text: Results cached locally first download repeated calls instant don’t touch API. cache directory defaults tools::R_user_dir("comtrade", "cache") can overridden options(comtrade.cache_dir = "//path"). Cache entries expire 24 hours trade data 7 days reference tables.

title: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data
text: data comes United Nations Comtrade database via Comtrade Plus API. package affiliated endorsed United Nations.

what: comtrade: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data — comtrade-package
title: comtrade: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data — comtrade-package
text: Download analyse international merchandise services trade data United Nations Comtrade database https://comtradeplus.un.org/. Retrieve bilateral trade flows, compute trade analytics (revealed comparative advantage, trade concentration, trade balance), convert commodity classifications (Harmonised System 'HS', Standard International Trade Classification 'SITC', Broad Economic Categories 'BEC'). Covers 200+ reporter countries, 60+ years goods trade data (1962-present), services trade via Extended Balance Payments Services ('EBOPS'). Works without registration basic queries. free Application Programming Interface ('API') key https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/ unlocks full access.

title: comtrade: Access and Analyse UN Comtrade International Trade Data — comtrade-package
text: Maintainer: Charles Coverdale charlesfcoverdale@gmail.com

title: Check Data Availability — ct_available
text: Check years classifications data available given reporter country.

title: Check Data Availability — ct_available
code: ct_available(reporter, cache = TRUE)

title: Check Data Availability — ct_available
text: reporter Character. Reporter country ISO3 code. cache Logical. Cache results. Default TRUE.

title: Check Data Availability — ct_available
text: data.frame columns: year, classification, type (C/S), frequency (/M).

title: Trade Balance by Partner — ct_balance
text: Compute trade balance (exports minus imports) reporter country trading partner.

title: Trade Balance by Partner — ct_balance
code: ct_balance(   reporter,   partner = "0",   year = NULL,   commodity = "TOTAL",   cache = TRUE )

title: Trade Balance by Partner — ct_balance
text: reporter Character. Reporter country ISO3 code. partner Character. Partner country code, "0" World. Default "0". year Integer. Year(s) query. commodity Character. Commodity code. Default "TOTAL". cache Logical. Default TRUE.

title: Trade Balance by Partner — ct_balance
text: data.frame columns: partner, partner_desc, year, exports, imports, balance.

title: Trade Balance by Partner — ct_balance
code: # \donttest{ op <- options(comtrade.cache_dir = tempdir()) ct_balance("GBR", year = 2023) #> ℹ No API key set. Using preview endpoint (500 records max, no descriptions). #> ℹ For full access (100k records, descriptions), get a free key at #>   <https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/> #> ℹ Then run: `ct_set_key("your-key")` #>   partner partner_desc year      exports      imports       balance #> 1       0        World 2023 231805144781 582770820322 -350965675541 options(op) # }

title: Clear the Comtrade Cache — ct_cache_clear
text: Remove cached Comtrade API responses local cache directory.

title: Clear the Comtrade Cache — ct_cache_clear
code: ct_cache_clear()

title: Clear the Comtrade Cache — ct_cache_clear
text: Invisibly returns TRUE cache cleared, FALSE cache directory existed.

title: Clear the Comtrade Cache — ct_cache_clear
code: # \donttest{ op <- options(comtrade.cache_dir = tempdir()) ct_cache_clear() #> Cleared 2 cached files. options(op) # }

title: Search Commodity Codes — ct_commodities
text: Search HS (Harmonized System) commodity classification codes matching keyword code pattern. Uses built-table 96 two-digit HS chapters descriptions.

title: Search Commodity Codes — ct_commodities
code: ct_commodities(query = NULL, level = NULL)

title: Search Commodity Codes — ct_commodities
text: query Character. Search term (matched commodity descriptions) partial HS code (e.g., "27" mineral fuels). Default NULL (return ). level Integer. HS digit level return. Currently level 2 available built-table. Default NULL (levels).

title: Search Commodity Codes — ct_commodities
text: data.frame columns: code HS 2-digit chapter code description Chapter description level Digit level (always 2 built-table) parent Parent code (NA 2-digit chapters)

title: Compare Countries — ct_compare
text: Compare multiple countries' trade given commodity, showing exports, imports, balance, revealed comparative advantage.

title: Compare Countries — ct_compare
code: ct_compare(reporters, commodity = "TOTAL", year = NULL, cache = TRUE)

title: Compare Countries — ct_compare
text: reporters Character vector. ISO3 codes countries compare. commodity Character. Commodity code. Default "TOTAL". year Integer. Year query. cache Logical. Default TRUE.

title: Compare Countries — ct_compare
text: data.frame columns: reporter, reporter_desc, exports, imports, balance, rca.

title: Compare Countries — ct_compare
code: # \donttest{ op <- options(comtrade.cache_dir = tempdir()) ct_compare(c("GBR", "DEU", "FRA"), commodity = "87", year = 2023) #> ℹ No API key set. Using preview endpoint (500 records max, no descriptions). #> ℹ For full access (100k records, descriptions), get a free key at #>   <https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/> #> ℹ Then run: `ct_set_key("your-key")` #> ℹ No API key set. Using preview endpoint (500 records max, no descriptions). #> ℹ For full access (100k records, descriptions), get a free key at #>   <https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/> #> ℹ Then run: `ct_set_key("your-key")` #> ℹ No API key set. Using preview endpoint (500 records max, no descriptions). #> ℹ For full access (100k records, descriptions), get a free key at #>   <https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/> #> ℹ Then run: `ct_set_key("your-key")` #>   reporter reporter_desc      exports      imports      balance rca #> 1      GBR         World  87919734611  71448562351  16471172260  NA #> 2      DEU         World 744966868389 504096215394 240870652994  NA #> 3      FRA          <NA>            0            0            0  NA options(op) # }

title: Convert Between Trade Classifications — ct_concordance
text: Convert commodity codes HS (Harmonized System), SITC, BEC classifications. Uses built-concordance table covering common 2-digit HS chapters mapped SITC sections BEC categories.

title: Convert Between Trade Classifications — ct_concordance
code: ct_concordance(code, from = "HS", to = "SITC")

title: Convert Between Trade Classifications — ct_concordance
text: code Character. commodity code(s) convert. Character. Source classification: "HS", "SITC", "BEC". Character. Target classification: "HS", "SITC", "BEC".

title: Convert Between Trade Classifications — ct_concordance
text: data.frame columns: from_code, from_desc, to_code, to_desc.

title: Convert Between Trade Classifications — ct_concordance
text: detailed 4/6-digit concordances, see concordance R package CRAN.

title: Convert Between Trade Classifications — ct_concordance
code: # Convert HS chapter 27 (mineral fuels) to SITC ct_concordance("27", from = "HS", to = "SITC") #>   from_code           from_desc to_code       to_desc #> 1        27 Mineral fuels, oils       3 Mineral fuels  # Convert SITC section 0 (food) to HS ct_concordance("0", from = "SITC", to = "HS") #>    from_code             from_desc to_code                 to_desc #> 1          0 Food and live animals      01            Live animals #> 2          0 Food and live animals      02                    Meat #> 3          0 Food and live animals      03                    Fish #> 4          0 Food and live animals      04      Dairy, eggs, honey #> 5          0 Food and live animals      05   Other animal products #> 6          0 Food and live animals      07              Vegetables #> 7          0 Food and live animals      08             Fruit, nuts #> 8          0 Food and live animals      09     Coffee, tea, spices #> 9          0 Food and live animals      10                 Cereals #> 10         0 Food and live animals      11        Milling products #> 11         0 Food and live animals      16       Meat preparations #> 12         0 Food and live animals      17                  Sugars #> 13         0 Food and live animals      18                   Cocoa #> 14         0 Food and live animals      19     Cereal preparations #> 15         0 Food and live animals      20  Vegetable preparations #> 16         0 Food and live animals      21 Misc. food preparations #> 17         0 Food and live animals      23   Residues, animal feed

title: Trade Growth Over Time — ct_growth
text: Compute year--year cumulative trade growth bilateral flow.

title: Trade Growth Over Time — ct_growth
code: ct_growth(   reporter,   partner = "0",   commodity = "TOTAL",   flow = "X",   years = NULL,   cache = TRUE )

title: Trade Growth Over Time — ct_growth
text: reporter Character. Reporter country ISO3 code. partner Character. Partner country code. Default "0" (World). commodity Character. Commodity code. Default "TOTAL". flow Character. "X" "M". Default "X". years Integer vector. Years query (least 2). cache Logical. Default TRUE.

title: Trade Growth Over Time — ct_growth
text: data.frame columns: year, value, growth_yoy, growth_cumulative, index_100.

title: Trade Growth Over Time — ct_growth
code: # \donttest{ op <- options(comtrade.cache_dir = tempdir()) ct_growth("GBR", flow = "X", years = 2018:2023) #> ℹ No API key set. Using preview endpoint (500 records max, no descriptions). #> ℹ For full access (100k records, descriptions), get a free key at #>   <https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/> #> ℹ Then run: `ct_set_key("your-key")` #>   year        value growth_yoy growth_cumulative index_100 #> 1 2018 9.816807e+11         NA              0.00    100.00 #> 2 2019 1.873290e+12      90.82             90.82    190.82 #> 3 2020 1.582768e+12     -15.51             61.23    161.23 #> 4 2021 1.882191e+12      18.92             91.73    191.73 #> 5 2022 6.811529e+11     -63.81            -30.61     69.39 options(op) # }

title: Trade Concentration Index (HHI) — ct_hhi
text: Compute Herfindahl-Hirschman Index measuring concentration country's trade across partners products.

title: Trade Concentration Index (HHI) — ct_hhi
code: ct_hhi(   reporter,   flow = "X",   year = NULL,   by = "partner",   level = 2L,   cache = TRUE )

title: Trade Concentration Index (HHI) — ct_hhi
text: reporter Character. Reporter country ISO3 code. flow Character. "X" "M". Default "X". year Integer. Year query. Character. Concentrate "partner" "product". Default "partner". level Integer. HS digit level (used = "product"). Default 2. cache Logical. Default TRUE.

title: Trade Concentration Index (HHI) — ct_hhi
text: data.frame columns: year, hhi, concentration, n_items, top_item, top_share_pct.

title: Trade Concentration Index (HHI) — ct_hhi
text: HHI ranges 0 (perfectly diversified) 10,000 (single partner/product). Interpretation: < 1,500 = low concentration, 1,500-2,500 = moderate, > 2,500 = high.

title: Trade Concentration Index (HHI) — ct_hhi
code: # \donttest{ op <- options(comtrade.cache_dir = tempdir())  # Export partner concentration ct_hhi("AUS", flow = "X", year = 2023, by = "partner") #> Warning: Country code "ALL" not found in reference table. Passing to API as-is. #> ℹ No API key set. Using preview endpoint (500 records max, no descriptions). #> ℹ For full access (100k records, descriptions), get a free key at #>   <https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/> #> ℹ Then run: `ct_set_key("your-key")` #> Error in ct_request(endpoint, params): Comtrade API error (HTTP 400).  # Export product concentration ct_hhi("AUS", flow = "X", year = 2023, by = "product") #> ℹ No API key set. Using preview endpoint (500 records max, no descriptions). #> ℹ For full access (100k records, descriptions), get a free key at #>   <https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/> #> ℹ Then run: `ct_set_key("your-key")` #>   year  hhi concentration n_items #> 1 2023 2094      moderate      97 #>                                                                                               top_item #> 1 Mineral fuels, mineral oils and products of their distillation; bituminous substances; mineral waxes #>   top_share_pct #> 1         34.98  options(op) # }

title: Revealed Comparative Advantage (Balassa Index) — ct_rca
text: Compute Revealed Comparative Advantage country's exports. RCA > 1 indicates country comparative advantage product.

title: Revealed Comparative Advantage (Balassa Index) — ct_rca
code: ct_rca(reporter, year = NULL, level = 2L, cache = TRUE)

title: Revealed Comparative Advantage (Balassa Index) — ct_rca
text: reporter Character. Reporter country ISO3 code. year Integer. Year query. level Integer. HS digit level: 2, 4, 6. Default 2. cache Logical. Default TRUE.

title: Revealed Comparative Advantage (Balassa Index) — ct_rca
text: data.frame columns: commodity_code, commodity_desc, reporter_value, world_value, reporter_share, world_share, rca, has_advantage.

title: Revealed Comparative Advantage (Balassa Index) — ct_rca
text: Balassa index defined : RCA = (country exports product / country total exports) / (world exports product / world total exports)

title: Revealed Comparative Advantage (Balassa Index) — ct_rca
code: # \donttest{ op <- options(comtrade.cache_dir = tempdir()) rca <- ct_rca("AUS", year = 2023) #> ℹ No API key set. Using preview endpoint (500 records max, no descriptions). #> ℹ For full access (100k records, descriptions), get a free key at #>   <https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/> #> ℹ Then run: `ct_set_key("your-key")` # Products where Australia has comparative advantage rca[rca$has_advantage, ] #> [1] commodity_code commodity_desc reporter_value world_value    reporter_share #> [6] world_share    rca            has_advantage  #> <0 rows> (or 0-length row.names) options(op) # }

title: List Reporter Countries — ct_reporters
text: Get list countries report trade data UN Comtrade, ISO3 codes M49 numeric codes.

title: List Reporter Countries — ct_reporters
code: ct_reporters(cache = TRUE)

title: List Reporter Countries — ct_reporters
text: cache Logical. Cache reference table locally. Default TRUE.

title: List Reporter Countries — ct_reporters
text: data.frame columns: code M49 numeric country code (used API queries) iso3 ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code (e.g., GBR, USA, AUS) name Country name is_group Logical. TRUE country groups (e.g., EU, OECD)

title: List Reporter Countries — ct_reporters
code: # \donttest{ op <- options(comtrade.cache_dir = tempdir()) reporters <- ct_reporters() #> Error in ct_request("public/v1/getDA/C/A/HS", params = list(), require_key = FALSE): Comtrade API error (HTTP 500). head(reporters) #> Error: object 'reporters' not found options(op) # }

title: Get Services Trade Data — ct_services
text: Download international services trade data UN Comtrade database using EBOPS (Extended Balance Payments Services) classification.

title: Get Services Trade Data — ct_services
code: ct_services(   reporter,   partner = "0",   service = "TOTAL",   flow = c("X", "M"),   year = NULL,   cache = TRUE )

title: Get Services Trade Data — ct_services
text: reporter Character. Reporter country ISO3 code. partner Character. Partner country code. Default "0" (World). service Character. EBOPS service code. Default "TOTAL". flow Character. Trade flow: "X" (exports), "M" (imports). Can vector. Default c("X", "M"). year Integer. Year(s) query (2000-present). Default: recent available year. cache Logical. Cache results locally. Default TRUE.

title: Get Services Trade Data — ct_services
text: data.frame columns: reporter, reporter_desc, partner, partner_desc, flow, flow_desc, service_code, service_desc, year, trade_value_usd.

title: Get Services Trade Data — ct_services
code: # \donttest{ op <- options(comtrade.cache_dir = tempdir())  # UK services exports to the world ct_services("GBR", year = 2022, flow = "X") #> ℹ No API key set. Using preview endpoint (500 records max, no descriptions). #> ℹ For full access (100k records, descriptions), get a free key at #>   <https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/> #> ℹ Then run: `ct_set_key("your-key")` #>  [1] reporterCode reporterDesc partnerCode  partnerDesc  flowCode     #>  [6] flowDesc     cmdCode      cmdDesc      refYear      primaryValue #> <0 rows> (or 0-length row.names)  options(op) # }

what: Set the Comtrade API Key — ct_set_key
title: Set the Comtrade API Key — ct_set_key
text: Store UN Comtrade API key current session. key saved R option optionally environment variable persistence.

title: Set the Comtrade API Key — ct_set_key
code: ct_set_key(key, install = FALSE)

title: Set the Comtrade API Key — ct_set_key
text: key Character. Comtrade API subscription key. install Logical. TRUE, also sets COMTRADE_API_KEY environment variable via Sys.setenv(), persists current R session. permanent storage, add COMTRADE_API_KEY=-key .Renviron file. Default FALSE.

title: Set the Comtrade API Key — ct_set_key
text: Invisibly returns key.

title: Set the Comtrade API Key — ct_set_key
text: Get free API key https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/. free tier allows 500 calls per day 100,000 records per call.

title: Set the Comtrade API Key — ct_set_key
code: # \donttest{ ct_set_key("your-subscription-key-here") #> Comtrade API key set for this session. # }

title: World Trade Share — ct_share
text: Compute country's share world trade given commodity.

title: World Trade Share — ct_share
code: ct_share(reporter, commodity = "TOTAL", flow = "X", year = NULL, cache = TRUE)

title: World Trade Share — ct_share
text: reporter Character. Reporter country ISO3 code. commodity Character. Commodity code. Default "TOTAL". flow Character. "X" "M". Default "X". year Integer. Year query. cache Logical. Default TRUE.

title: World Trade Share — ct_share
text: data.frame columns: commodity_code, reporter_value, world_value, share_pct.

title: World Trade Share — ct_share
code: # \donttest{ op <- options(comtrade.cache_dir = tempdir()) ct_share("AUS", commodity = "2601", flow = "X", year = 2023) #> Error in ct_request(endpoint, params): Comtrade API authentication failed (HTTP 401). #> ℹ Check your API key with `ct_set_key()`. #> ℹ Get a free key at <https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/> options(op) # }

title: Top Trading Partners — ct_top_partners
text: Rank country's trading partners total trade value.

title: Top Trading Partners — ct_top_partners
code: ct_top_partners(reporter, flow = "X", year = NULL, n = 20L, cache = TRUE)

title: Top Trading Partners — ct_top_partners
text: reporter Character. Reporter country ISO3 code. flow Character. "X" exports, "M" imports. Default "X". year Integer. Year query. n Integer. Number top partners return. Default 20. cache Logical. Default TRUE.

title: Top Trading Partners — ct_top_partners
text: data.frame columns: partner, partner_desc, value, share_pct, rank.

title: Top Trading Partners — ct_top_partners
code: # \donttest{ op <- options(comtrade.cache_dir = tempdir()) ct_top_partners("GBR", flow = "X", year = 2023) #> Warning: Country code "ALL" not found in reference table. Passing to API as-is. #> Error in ct_request(endpoint, params): Comtrade API authentication failed (HTTP 401). #> ℹ Check your API key with `ct_set_key()`. #> ℹ Get a free key at <https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/> options(op) # }

what: Top Export or Import Products — ct_top_products
title: Top Export or Import Products — ct_top_products
text: Rank country's traded products value, showing top N percentage shares.

title: Top Export or Import Products — ct_top_products
code: ct_top_products(   reporter,   flow = "X",   year = NULL,   n = 20L,   level = 2L,   cache = TRUE )

title: Top Export or Import Products — ct_top_products
text: reporter Character. Reporter country ISO3 code. flow Character. "X" exports, "M" imports. year Integer. Year query. n Integer. Number top products return. Default 20. level Integer. HS digit level: 2, 4, 6. Default 2. cache Logical. Default TRUE.

title: Top Export or Import Products — ct_top_products
text: data.frame columns: commodity_code, commodity_desc, value, share_pct, rank.

title: Get Bilateral Trade Data — ct_trade
text: Download merchandise trade data UN Comtrade database. Returns bilateral trade flows reporter partner countries, optionally filtered commodity code trade flow direction.

title: Get Bilateral Trade Data — ct_trade
code: ct_trade(   reporter,   partner = "0",   commodity = "TOTAL",   flow = c("X", "M"),   year = NULL,   frequency = "A",   classification = "HS",   cache = TRUE )

title: Get Bilateral Trade Data — ct_trade
text: reporter Character. Reporter country ISO3 code (e.g., "GBR", "USA", "AUS") numeric M49 code. Use "" reporters (limited 1 per query free tier). partner Character. Partner country ISO3 code, "0" / "W00" World (partners aggregated). Default "0" (World). commodity Character. HS commodity code(s). "TOTAL" aggregate trade, "AG2" 2-digit chapters, specific codes like "2709" (crude petroleum). Default "TOTAL". flow Character. Trade flow: "X" (exports), "M" (imports), "RX" (re-exports), "RM" (re-imports). Can vector multiple flows. Default c("X", "M"). year Integer. Year(s) query (1962-present). Can vector. Maximum 12-year span per query free tier. Default: recent available year. frequency Character. "" annual (default), "M" monthly. classification Character. Commodity classification system. Default "HS" (latest Harmonized System revision). See ct_commodities() available classifications. cache Logical. Cache results locally 24 hours. Default TRUE.

title: Get Bilateral Trade Data — ct_trade
text: data.frame columns: reporter Reporter country code reporter_desc Reporter country name partner Partner country code partner_desc Partner country name flow Trade flow code (X, M, RX, RM) flow_desc Trade flow description commodity_code Commodity code commodity_desc Commodity description year Reference year period Reference period (year year-month) trade_value_usd Trade value US dollars net_weight_kg Net weight kilograms quantity Quantity supplementary units quantity_unit Supplementary quantity unit

title: Get Bilateral Trade Data — ct_trade
code: # \donttest{ op <- options(comtrade.cache_dir = tempdir())  # UK total exports to the world, 2023 ct_trade("GBR", year = 2023, flow = "X") #> Error in ct_request(endpoint, params): Comtrade API authentication failed (HTTP 401). #> ℹ Check your API key with `ct_set_key()`. #> ℹ Get a free key at <https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/>  # US imports of crude petroleum from Saudi Arabia ct_trade("USA", partner = "SAU", commodity = "2709", flow = "M",          year = 2020:2023) #> Error in ct_request(endpoint, params): Comtrade API authentication failed (HTTP 401). #> ℹ Check your API key with `ct_set_key()`. #> ℹ Get a free key at <https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/>  # Australia's top-level trade with China ct_trade("AUS", partner = "CHN", year = 2023) #> Error in ct_request(endpoint, params): Comtrade API authentication failed (HTTP 401). #> ℹ Check your API key with `ct_set_key()`. #> ℹ Get a free key at <https://comtradedeveloper.un.org/>  options(op) # }

title: comtrade 0.1.1
text: Expanded acronyms DESCRIPTION (HS, SITC, BEC, EBOPS, API) per CRAN reviewer feedback.

title: comtrade 0.1.0
text: CRAN release: 2026-04-13 Initial CRAN release. Core data retrieval: ct_trade() goods, ct_services() services. Reference tables: ct_reporters(), ct_commodities(), ct_available(). Trade analytics: ct_balance(), ct_top_products(), ct_top_partners(), ct_rca(), ct_hhi(), ct_growth(), ct_share(), ct_compare(). Classification concordance: ct_concordance() built-HS/SITC/BEC mapping. Key management: ct_set_key(), ct_cache_clear(). Works without API key (preview endpoint). Free key available full access. 16 exported functions, 5 dependencies (cli, httr2, stats, tools, utils).
